## Summary

- Describe the change.
- Explain why it is needed.

## Related issue

- Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] Manual validation completed and described below

## Manual validation notes

- Platform(s) exercised:
- User-visible behavior checked:
- Screenshots, logs, or extra evidence:

## Changelog and docs

- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for notable user-facing, operational, security, or contributor-workflow changes.
- [ ] No changelog entry was needed for this change.
- [ ] I updated docs or comments for any changed behavior or workflow.

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it was practical, or explained why that was not needed.
- [ ] I considered security and privacy impact for the affected components.
